# Interface Contracts: [FEATURE]

**Purpose**: Define exact function signatures so parallel agents and implementation tasks produce compatible code. This file is the single source of truth for function names, parameter types, and return types.

**Generated by**: `/speckit.plan` (Phase 1: Design & Contracts)
**Consumed by**: `/speckit.implement` (all tasks must match these signatures)

## Rules

- Every exported function in the implementation MUST match the signature defined here
- Async vs sync MUST be specified explicitly — no guessing
- Parameter and return types MUST be concrete, not `any`
- If a signature needs to change during implementation, update this file FIRST

## Module: [module-name]

### [filename.ts]

```typescript
// FR-NNN: [description]
export function functionName(param: ParamType): ReturnType

// FR-NNN: [description]
export interface EntityName {
  field: Type
}
```

## Example

```typescript
// scaffold/generator.ts
// FR-001: Validate project name
export function validateProjectName(name: string): { ok: boolean; error?: string }

// FR-001: Generate project from template (SYNC — no async)
export function generateProject(name: string, targetDir: string): void

// modules/compatibility.ts
// FR-006: Check if directory is a Kit project
export function isKitProject(dir: string): boolean

// FR-006: Full pre-install validation
export function validateInstall(dir: string, moduleName: string): { ok: boolean; error?: string }
```
